entryCriteria.formula: OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000))

OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000),((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Manager'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000))

approvalStep.description: Approval record to Finance Manager Queue. (The current Finance Manager must be added to this queue to receive the request for approval)

entryCriteria.formula: OR(((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000))

approvalStep.label: Level 3
approvalStep.name: Level_3

ApprovalProcess.description: Check Request Approval Process for Customer Retention Program for USA market only for 5000 - 10000 amount range
ApprovalProcess.label: Check Request Approval Process CR USA -2
